title: Oxymeris tetraquetra

The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include reducing inflammation, alleviating fever, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities, thereby providing relief from various health issues. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
taxonomy: Oxymeris tetraquetra is classified within the family Veneridae, which includes clams. It belongs to the genus Oxymeris, a group of marine bivalve mollusks. This classification places Oxymeris tetraquetra within the kingdom Animalia.
